title: AI Study Coach Layer
purpose: Provide personalized next-step guidance, mistake explanations, and study planning across language, testing, conversation, and cognitive practice.
core_functions: explain why an answer was wrong
coach strategy rather than only content
support parents, students, and teachers with different views
design_rules: Keep explanations short first, with optional expansion.
Do not pretend certainty when evidence is weak.
Always tie advice to actual performance signals from the app.
